key_themes: Analyst upgrades and raised price targets ahead of earnings
iPhone demand recovery and 20% shipment growth in China
AI/Siri enhancements and innovation pipeline for 2026
Strong services revenue growth and solid fundamentals
Near-term risks from foldable iPhone delays and competition
summary: AAPL sentiment is positive heading into Q2 FY2026 earnings, supported by recent analyst upgrades including BofA raising its price target to $325 (Buy) and BNP Paribas upgrading to Outperform with a $300 target. Strong iPhone momentum in China (shipments +20% YoY), double-digit services growth, and high expectations for AI features at WWDC are driving optimism for a strong 2026, despite earlier YTD weakness on AI execution concerns. Consensus is Buy with average targets around $293-300, implying 10-15% upside from current levels near $260-265.
sources: 15+ news articles and analyst reports, 25+ relevant X posts
